OptionalReleaseEip.eip: The selected EIP addresses to release, including IPv4 EIP and IPv6 EIP.
OptionalReleaseEip.releaseToRecycle: Whether to move the specified EIP to the recycle bin. Default is false, meaning the EIP will be released directly.
OptionalReleaseEip.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of no more than 64 characters. See Idempotency for details.
